_comment: Shared model config for ALL subagent role-commands (/research, /planner, /implementer, /tester). 'defaults' is an ORDERED pool: the Nth concurrent spawn uses defaults[N-1]; once concurrency exceeds defaults.length, extra spawns use 'defaultOverflow'. Sequential spawns use defaults[0]. Per-role overrides live under 'roles'; an empty {} inherits the top-level pool. Legacy keys 'default' (string) and 'models' are still honored.
_setup: Replace the placeholder model IDs below with model IDs that exist in your Pi provider config (models.json). 'local-llm/...' suggests a local llama.cpp/vLLM server; a cheaper/cloud model is a good 'defaultOverflow'.

planner._comment: Example per-role override: give the plan writer a stronger reasoning model.
